calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-13-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Prado. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-13-2023 Continued To Feb-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-24-2023 Continued To Dec-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Oct-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Donal Casey Cummins, Esq., moving party on the motion to be relieved as counsel.
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The Court stated that it had reviewed the matter, that Mr. Cummins is asking to be relieved as counsel, and that it understands that there is an irreparable breakdown between the attorney and client. The Court stated that it had reviewed the pleadings and that the only matter before it today is Mr. Cummin's motion to be relieved as counsel. The Court confirmed December 13, 2023, as the next hearing date on the pending petition for probate. Mr. Cummins confirmed for the Court that he was aware of the next hearing date.

The Court waived any incomplete notice. The Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel filed by Mr. Cummins was taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Jaime. Matter not reported.
